constraints.layout_style: fieldset stacks with legend-only section titles

required_complexity_patterns.notes: Custom text field: div with role=textbox and contenteditable, no native input
Fields inside a shadow DOM host or declarative shadow root
Label wraps input through nested divs without for attribute
Label text split across multiple spans with no space between words
Inputs laid out in table cells, not flex card stacks only

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, small, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: Custom text field: div with role=textbox and contenteditable, no native input Required: Fields inside a shadow DOM host or declarative shadow root Required: Label wraps input through nested divs without for attribute Required: Label text split across multiple spans with no space between words Required: Inputs laid out in table cells, not flex card stacks only Reference DOM (Definition list form): Fields structured as dl/dt/dd definition list pairs Reference DOM (Placeholder-only identification): Empty label element; field identified only by placeholder attribute Reference DOM (Role group not fieldset): Grouped radios use div role=group instead of fieldset Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: div-role-textbox, shadow-host, label-wraps-deep, glued-label-text, table-layout. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: fieldset stacks with legend-only section titles. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Definition list form; Placeholder-only identification; Role group not fieldset.
